notableMoments: First African nation to play in a World Cup (1934)
56-year gap between first (1934) and second (1990) appearances
Record 7-time Africa Cup of Nations champions
Mohamed Salah led Egypt's return to the World Cup in 2018 after 28 years
Salah played through a shoulder injury sustained in the 2018 Champions League final
Lost all three games in 2018 but the qualification campaign was celebrated nationwide
